description: Voyage AI provides embedding and reranking models for search, retrieval, and RAG workloads. Its service includes text, contextualized, and multimodal embeddings plus batch processing and file management for large inference jobs.
summary: Voyage AI exposes one authenticated HTTP API at https://api.voyageai.com/v1 for embeddings, reranking, files, and batch jobs; authentication is via a Voyage-issued API key in a Bearer Authorization header.
